word: G1879 - ἐπαναπαύομαι - epanapaúomai - ep-an-ah-pow'-om-ahee - Rest in

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐπαναπαύομαι

- Transliteration: Epanapauomai

- Phonetic: ep-an-ah-pow'-om-ahee

- Definition:

1. to cause to rest upon anything

2. to rest upon anything

3. to settle upon, fix its abode upon

- Origin: middle voice from G1909 and G373

- TDNT entry: 1:351,*

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: Middle voice from G1909 and G373; to settle on; literally (remain) or figuratively (rely): - rest in (upon).
